violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Vacuum sealed deli meats and cheeses in the meat department walk in cooler were stored under raw whole pork.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Dishes for the new Picadeli salad bar were being washed in the single prep sink in the produce area. Dishes in the meat department were being washed in the single sink in the meat department. There needs to be a sink with at least three compartments to wash, rinse, and sanitize dishes.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Sheet cake bases and lids on the red shelves by the deli walk in cooler were not inverted, or covered.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. A hand sink in the produce area was covered with clean dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling around the vent and light in the deli area needs to be cleaned.
